falsification_logic.confirm_like: eta/s or M_KSS has a clear minimum vs collisionality and stellarator rows lie below tokamak rows at matched edge parameters.
falsification_logic.current_script_policy: Do not convert f_ELM/collisionality into eta/s unless a public paper gives the conversion or provides eta/s rows.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: eta/s/M_KSS is monotonic or stellarator rows are not lower after matched controls and uncertainty propagation.

fusion_edge_proxy.proxy_caveat: The DIII-D non-monotonic f_ELM/collisionality signal is not eta/s. W7-X text flags support the stellarator context only, not a numerical M_KSS comparison.
fusion_edge_proxy.why_not_decisive: FR8 needs eta/s or M_KSS values on a common basis. Public sources here provide QGP eta/s context, DIII-D collisionality/f_ELM ranges, and W7-X optimization context, but not edge eta/s or stellarator M_KSS rows.

minimum_required_for_decisive_test: >=10 tokamak rows with collisionality and edge eta/s or M_KSS
>=5 stellarator rows with comparable edge eta/s or M_KSS
common units and method for entropy density/viscosity or diffusivity-to-M_KSS conversion
prediction: FR8: non-monotonic eta/s vs collisionality; stellarator edge transport should approach lower M_KSS than tokamaks.

qgp_proxy.note: This is evidence that QGP eta/s extraction is public-literature anchored; it is not a machine-readable eta/s(T,collisionality) table.
